title: Geraniospermum oxalidifolium

intro:

Geranium (family Geraniaceae) is a genus of flowering plants characterized by their showy, five-petaled flowers and distinctive seed pods. The health benefits of Geranium species, including Geraniospermum oxalidifolium if it exists, are not well-documented, but some studies suggest that they may have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties.
